name: gotcha-skills
description: GOTCHA! 找茬 for CodeBuddy — Systematic self-critique skill. Six-category audit, three intensity levels. Trigger on '找茬', 'gotcha', 'review my work'.

plugins.name: gotcha
plugins.description: GOTCHA! 找茬 — Find bugs, edge cases, security issues before the user does. Six audit categories: Correctness, Security, Robustness, Performance, Design, Completeness.
